title: Butterfly — Simple Story (between-token insertion)
description: Meet-in-the-middle decoder under butterfly RoPE; speculative positioning across the seam.

title: Multithread-LM — generation (synth)
description: Mimic trace: parent prompt, <bot-K>, parallel <sot>s, lockstep sibling decode, laggard tail, <bos> committed at the wave's row end (postpone rule structural under the new layout).

title: Causal AR — BOS-bestfit (simple_story, B=1 T=2048)
description: Single row at the real training T; multi-doc packing visible across the row.

title: Multithread-LM — dataloader (real, B=2 T=1024)
description: Real-corpus multithread loader on simple_story, policy=pairs. BOS-bestfit row-packing reproduced via compile_doc; doc_idx tints between packed docs; paragraph-end target overrides visible (<|bot_K|>, <|eot|>, <|bos|>); held decision-last positions sit at end of each wave's row segment.

title: Butterfly — MIM masks (N=16)
description: Five variants: butterfly + naive/perdoc interleave × orig/seq coords. Doc boundaries marked.

title: Multithread-LM — staircase mask (real, N=213)
description: Real-corpus all_parallel doc, widths 1*67, 2*71, 1*4. Three matrices: full N×N staircase, vanilla causal comparison, and compact N×max_W staircase that drops the uniformly-visible lower-triangular bulk and shows only the staircase silhouette (1 cell for width-1 blocks, K cells for K-parallel blocks).

title: Causal AR — RoPE schemes (plain / PI×2 / hidden-thinking)
description: Three positional schemes on a 10-token sequence. Hidden-thinking variant pins thinking-token k_pos to the parent so later queries see them as co-positioned.

title: Multithread-LM — RoPE (real, N=213)
description: Multithread paragraph-aligned RoPE (anchors at paragraph_idx*256) vs seq-position baseline. BOS at rope 0; sibling <sot>s at 256, 512; held decision-last at its thread's natural rope_idx, decoupled from row position.
